overview_faqs.question: Is BSc Physiology a good career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BSc Physiology can be a good career choice, especially for those passionate about understanding the human body and its functions. It provides a solid foundation for various career paths in healthcare, research, education, and clinical settings. Graduates can pursue roles in clinical research, laboratory analysis, fitness and health sectors, or continue further studies in specialised fields like MSc Physiology, Clinical Psychology, or Medicine. The increasing demand for healthcare professionals, coupled with advancements in medical research and technology, offers ample career opportunities. With the right skill set and further qualifications, BSc Physiology graduates can build a rewarding and impactful career.

reviews_list.review_title: The GNIOT College, the only way to success for you.

review_content.Placements: The passing out batch has got a very great placement in various companies with a good package. The average package is around 600,000-700,000. Companies like Zomato, Tata, and Boast come to campus. The college even provides internships and hackathons with great prize money.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking honestly, it is not worth it. The building is old, the food is not tasty, the Wi-Fi network is poor, and the hostel timings are very strict. The price is quite high. You can get non-campus hostels or PGs at a cheaper rate with more facilities and fewer rules and regulations.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Greater Noida Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Usually, there is no discussion about the placement ratio. Teachers just informed us that most of students did not get any placement due to a lack of skills and knowledge. Most of them get rejected in companies' aptitude tests, but the college mentioned on their website that the highest package offered is 70 LPA. The average package offered is 7.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: According to me, the infrastructure is okay. Wi-Fi is good and has a speed of more than 100 Mbps. Every class has its own Wi-Fi network. The institution also has a particular Wi-Fi. The library is good, but they don't have as many books as they mentioned on the website. However, it can be managed. Hostel food is average according to my friends and me.

content.Placements: GNIOT has an active placement cell that invites many companies yearly. In recent drives, over 300-400 recruiters visited, with around 700+ students placed across programs. The highest salary has gone up to around 70 LPA (international) and domestic packages around 27 LPA, while the average package is around 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HP, Cognizant, and many more, offering roles in IT, management, finance, and analytics.
content.Infrastructure: GNIOT has a large, modern campus with AC classrooms, smart boards, labs for all departments, and a big library with thousands of books and e-resources. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, sports grounds, an auditorium, cafeteria, medical facilities, Wi-Fi, and transport services. Overall, good infrastructure for study and campus life.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Let's talk about GNIOT Greater Noida.

content.Placements: College history on a placement basis is not that great, placements are just average. Almost 80% students are placed, but all those are mass recruitment companies taking students on packages of 3-5 LPA. For placements, you have to work hard and try on your own if you need better.
content.Infrastructure: The college area is not that vast, but the infrastructure is good. Classes are equipped with AC and smart projectors. Hostel facility is also available. Three canteens are in the college. Sports facilities are also available in the college. The college is also equipped with a music room. Which is in gips.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The GNIOT College, the only way to success for you.

content.Placements: The passing out batch has got a very great placement in various companies with a good package. The average package is around 600,000-700,000. Companies like Zomato, Tata, and Boast come to campus. The college even provides internships and hackathons with great prize money.
content.Infrastructure: Talking honestly, it is not worth it. The building is old, the food is not tasty, the Wi-Fi network is poor, and the hostel timings are very strict. The price is quite high. You can get non-campus hostels or PGs at a cheaper rate with more facilities and fewer rules and regulations.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Greater Noida Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Usually, there is no discussion about the placement ratio. Teachers just informed us that most of students did not get any placement due to a lack of skills and knowledge. Most of them get rejected in companies' aptitude tests, but the college mentioned on their website that the highest package offered is 70 LPA. The average package offered is 7.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: According to me, the infrastructure is okay. Wi-Fi is good and has a speed of more than 100 Mbps. Every class has its own Wi-Fi network. The institution also has a particular Wi-Fi. The library is good, but they don't have as many books as they mentioned on the website. However, it can be managed. Hostel food is average according to my friends and me.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college to learn and improve.

content.Placements: In my college, not many students got a placement. The percentage of students who got placed in my course in 2025 is 40 to 60 percent. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, HP, and Capgemini, but not many placements are offered. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. The top roles offered by the companies are Software Trainees.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average but decent, still needs more improvement. Wi-Fi is not always available for students, labs are decent in every classroom. Everything works fine, but they need better bathroom facilities. Some buildings are really old but strong.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Bilaspur University?
faqs.answer: Bilaspur University admissions usually open in May or June every year with registration. The mode of application is both online and offline. Candidates need to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university for admission to UG and PG courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Bilaspur University?
faqs.answer: Bilaspur University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on in-house entrance exam. The selection to PhD course requires qualifying DET or Doctoral Entrance Test for admission. Aspirants seeking admission in Diploma can get direct admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants once selected must pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Atal Bihari Vajpayee Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: Bilaspur University conducts AUUGCET for admission to UG programmes whereas, AUPGCET is conducted for courses offered at the PG level. The university also conducts a Doctoral Entrance Test for selecting candidates for PhD admission. Besides, admission to Diploma programmes is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Bilaspur University?
faqs.answer: Bilaspur University selects aspirants based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. Aspirants need to appear for the UG or PG entrance exam as required by the course for admission. The university conducts DET for admission to the PhD programme. The selection to Diploma courses offered by the university is merit-based.

The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Rattan Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include UG Diploma, GNM, M.Ed and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 58,000 - 2,02,200. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.
